locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

locations.name: 巴西
locations.summary: 巴西联邦共和国（葡萄牙語：República Federativa do Brasil），通稱巴西（Brasil），是南美洲國家，位於南美東部，東臨大西洋，人口2.15億，居世界第7。其國土大部分介于赤道和南回归线之间，面積851萬平方公…

locations.name: 巴拉圭
locations.summary: 巴拉圭共和國（西班牙語：República del Paraguay、瓜拉尼語：Paraguái Tavakuairetã），通稱巴拉圭（西班牙語：Paraguay；瓜拉尼語：Paraguái），是位於南美洲的主權國家，也是位於南美洲的內…

locations.name: 乌拉圭
locations.summary: 乌拉圭东岸共和国（西班牙語：República Oriental del Uruguay），通称乌拉圭（西班牙語：Uruguay），南美洲东南部国家，西邻阿根廷，东与北邻巴西，南濒拉普拉塔河，东南濒大西洋。乌拉圭人口342万，其中近180…

locations.name: 内格罗河省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 内格罗河省（西班牙語：Río Negro），或译黑河省，為南美國家阿根廷23省之一，位於阿根廷中南部，省会别德马。 参考文献

relations.subject: Bay-capped wren-spinetail
relations.evidence: Peters]], 1950 | species = maluroides | authority = (D'Orbigny & Lafresnaye, 1837) | range_map = Spartonoica maluroides map.svg }} The bay-capped wren-spinetail (Spartonoica maluroides) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Bay-capped wren-spinetail
relations.evidence: The bay-capped wren-spinetail is found from extreme southern Brazil south through Uruguay into northern Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province. It also has occurred as a non-breeder in Paraguay. It inhabits reedbeds and sedges in freshwater, brackish, and saltwater marshes

relations.subject: Bay-capped wren-spinetail
relations.evidence: The bay-capped wren-spinetail is found from extreme southern Brazil south through Uruguay into northern Argentina as far south as Río Negro Province. It also has occurred as a non-breeder in Paraguay. It inhabits reedbeds and sedges in freshwater, brackish, and saltwater marshes
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Bay-capped wren-spinetail
relations.evidence: "This species is limited to wetland habitats, and is therefore highly threatened by marsh drainage and the drying effects of Eucalyptus and Pinus plantations, particularly in east Entre Ríos and north-east Corrientes [Argentina]
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
